# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change (public SDK API / contract interface / CLI flags)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`forge test` / `cargo test` / `bun test`, as relevant)
- [ ] Public-interface changes are reflected in the [compatibility matrix](docs/COMPATIBILITY.md) and `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or `.env` values added
- [ ] Crypto domain-separation tags are unchanged (they are frozen protocol constants)
